summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dashboard update features. Most requested changes are working correctly, with some notable issues identified.

data_issues.issue: Returns empty arrays for best and hardest LVAs
data_issues.impact: Top 5 sections not displaying on LVA page

integration_issues.issue: Top 5 Beste and Top 5 Schwerste sections not showing due to empty API data

missing_features.issue: English language toggle not found for testing LVA-Check -> Course Check translation

passed_tests: Homepage marquee shows 'WIR SETZEN UNS FÜR DICH EIN'
ÖH JKU link in hero section links to oeh.jku.at/wirtschaft
Footer ÖH link links to oeh.jku.at/wirtschaft
Instagram EmbedSocial widget with hardcoded ref a9db327a2fe2e814a251e2fddb9719f2fc984c28
LVA page has 4 steps including problematic courses info
Admin dashboard sidebar allows scrolling (overflow-y: visible)
Admin panel login works with provided credentials
Study categories API working (4 categories found)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Add sample LVA data to database so Top 5 sections display properly. 2) Ensure language toggle is accessible for testing English translations. 3) Verify partner section allows up to 8 partners (could not fully test due to selector limitations).
success_percentage: Backend: 80% (4/5 tests passed), Frontend: 75% (6/8 features working correctly)
